p.strong: Intel-Manual Quality Specification: Memory layout for batching log records before syscall

ul.li: Memory Bounds: All writes restricted to [base+0x28, base+cap].
LSN Monotonicity: Buffer must be flushed before writing lower LSN.
Page Alignment: mmap allocation ensured at 4KB page boundary.

g.title: Records are being appended to 0x28 + used
Records are being appended to 0x28 + used
